name: Fusili with Creamy Spinach Sauce

ingredients.item: thin strips of red bell pepper

method: Boil spinach and drain well, remove as much water as possible. Boil salted water for pasta, add fusilli, and cook until al dente. In the meantime, in a large frying pan on medium heat, saute onion and two strips of pepper in 1 T butter and 1 T olive oil. Saute for two minutes, remove pepper strips, then add spinach, heavy cream, soy sauce, oyster sauce, salt, and pepper. Mix well to form a cream sauce, if your cream is too watery, you can dissolve 1 T cornstarch or flour in 2 T cold water, if it’s too thick, add a little pasta water. Place the two pepper strips on top, it’s just an accent to give more flavor to the spinach.
Drain and add pasta to creamy sauce. Mix and manticare well. Top with grated parmesan. This is Leo's recipe! Serves 2-3. Serving Suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Olé
